title: Chapter 89

Chapter 89

The main point was that there was no magic spell, to my knowledge, that could stop time to the extent that even the trees couldn’t move. Looking at the strange phenomenon, I could only say that it was a celestial event. Gods may not exist, and beings behind the curtain were mistaken as gods, but there was still an entity that had put those beings behind a curtain.

Mainly, the will of the world. That was correct. Every universe or world had its own will. Like that anime where inanimate objects could come to life after a very long time or due to human faith and such. Like Sta*lord's father, who was a literal living planet.

This world was the same, and it could cause such a thing to happen if it's defense mechanism was activated, but the problem was that such an event couldn’t be interpreted as something good or fortunate. With such an event, nothing but chaos would follow.

Suddenly, everything was giving me a headache. Not to mention…
